name: _externalAuths
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_externalAuths_record_provider` ON `_externalAuths` (collectionRef, recordRef, provider)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_externalAuths_collection_provider` ON `_externalAuths` (collectionRef, provider, providerId)

name: _authOrigins
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_authOrigins_unique_pairs` ON `_authOrigins` (collectionRef, recordRef, fingerprint)

emailTemplate.subject: Login from a new location
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

We noticed a login to your {APP_NAME} account from a new location:

{ALERT_INFO}

If this wasn't you, you should immediately change your {APP_NAME} account password to revoke access from all other locations.

If this was you, you may disregard this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

emailTemplate.subject: OTP for {APP_NAME}
emailTemplate.body:
Hello,

Your one-time password is: {OTP}

If you didn't ask for the one-time password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

verificationTemplate.subject: Verify your {APP_NAME} email
verificationTemplate.body:
Hello,

Thank you for joining us at {APP_NAME}.

Click on the button below to verify your email address.

Verify

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

If you didn't ask to reset your password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

If you didn't ask to change your email address, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,
{APP_NAME} team

name: KATALOG_WIDOK
viewQuery:
SELECT 
  id,
  created,
  updated,
  NAZWA,
  OPIS,
  OPIS_PELNY,
  URL,
  url_film,
  tagi,
  bole,
  potrzeby,
  AKTYWNE,
  ('https://pb.gryf.ai/api/files/KATALOG_NARZEDZI/' || id || '/' || LOGO) as PELNE_LOGO
FROM KATALOG_NARZEDZI

name: KATALOG_EKSPERCI_WIDOK
viewQuery:
SELECT
    e.id,
    e.nazwa_wyswietlana,
    e.opis,
    e.strona_www,
    e.narzedzia,
    e.telefon,
    e.mail_kontaktowy,
    (
        SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(n.NAZWA, ', ')
        FROM KATALOG_NARZEDZI n -- Poprawione z ...NARZEDZIA na ...NARZEDZI
        WHERE e.narzedzia LIKE '%' || n.id || '%'
    ) AS specjalizacje,
    ('https://pb.gryf.ai/api/files/KATALOG_EKSPERCI/' || e.id || '/' || e.logo) AS logo_url
FROM KATALOG_EKSPERCI e;

name: KATALOG_BOLE_WIDOK
viewQuery:
SELECT 
  kb.id,
  kb.KATEGORIA,
  kb.PODKATEGORIA,
  kb.NAZWA,
  kb.OPIS,
  kb.AKTYWNE,
  ('https://pb.gryf.ai/api/files/KATALOG_BOLE/' || kb.id || '/' || kb.OBRAZ) as PELNY_OBRAZ,
  kp.NAZWA as NAZWA_PODKATEGORII
FROM KATALOG_BOLE kb
LEFT JOIN KATALOG_PODKATEGORIE kp ON kb.PODKATEGORIA = kp.id

name: KATALOG_PODKATEGORIE_WIDOK
viewQuery:
SELECT 
  kp.id,
  kp.created,
  kp.updated,
  kp.KATEGORIA,
  kp.NAZWA,
  kp.OPIS,
  kp.OBRAZ,
  kp.GEMINI,
  kp.CLAUDE,
  kp.CHATGPT,
  kp.BIELIK,
  kp.QWEN,
  kp.GROK,
  kp.PERPLEXITY,
  kp.GRYF,
  ('https://pb.gryf.ai/api/files/KATALOG_PODKATEGORIE/' || kp.id || '/' || kp.OBRAZ) as PELNY_OBRAZ,
  COALESCE(agg.lista_boli, '') as BOLE
FROM KATALOG_PODKATEGORIE kp
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT PODKATEGORIA, GROUP_CONCAT(NAZWA, ', ') as lista_boli
  FROM KATALOG_BOLE
  GROUP BY PODKATEGORIA
) agg ON agg.PODKATEGORIA = kp.id
